data.description:
## Context
The rebar-brainstorm skill (`examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md`) drives a design
loop that ends by recording the design as rebar tickets. It does not instruct the agent to read
the project's plan-review gate criteria first, so tickets are authored blind to the gate and then
hit BLOCK findings that must be remediated after the fact. Beneficiary: agents (and their users)
running the brainstorm skill, who currently pay that avoidable remediation tax.

## What
Add a subsection to the skill instructing the agent, before recording tickets, to read the
project's plan-review gate docs (`docs/plan-review-gate.md`, `docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md`),
author each ticket to the gate's blocking criteria + overlays, then run `rebar review-plan <id>`
and remediate findings before claiming.

## Scope
- In: a docs-only addition to `examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md`.
- Out: changes to the live `~/.claude/skills` copy (personal, not version-controlled); changes to
  the gate itself or other skills.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `examples/claude-skills/rebar-brainstorm/SKILL.md` contains a new subsection instructing the
      agent to read `docs/plan-review-gate.md` and `docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md` before
      recording tickets.
- [ ] The subsection states the standard: read the gate first, author to its blocking criteria +
      overlays, then run `rebar review-plan <id>` and remediate before claiming.
- [ ] The change is docs-only: `git diff --stat origin/main` shows only that one SKILL.md file changed.
- [ ] The change lands on `main` through Gerrit with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 (submitted).
data.title: docs(brainstorm-skill): read plan-review gate docs before recording tickets
